title: [FMCS-S] fps X media X crystal x survival Optimized SERVER
description: A server‑side performance core focused on tick stability and optimization to support smooth gameplay and high FPS.
body:
# 🟦 FMCS-S — Server Edition
## fps × media × crystal × survival

## 📘 Overview
FMCS-S is the **server-side edition** of the FMCS series.  
It is designed as a **performance core for servers**, focusing on tick stability, optimized logic, and smooth gameplay for all players — without requiring any client-side mods.

This edition does **not** change visuals.  
Instead, it ensures that the server runs clean, fast, and stable under load.

> [!TIP]
> Recommended for Crystal PvP & survival servers, and competitive environments.

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Improve server TPS and tick stability  
- Reduce lag during combat and high-load situations  
- Optimize entity handling, and world logic  
- Provide a clean and efficient server foundation  
- Support high FPS on client side by keeping server performance stable  
- Act as the **server core** alongside FMCS client editions

---

## ✨ Features
- Server-side only (no client mods required)  
- Tick optimization and scheduler tuning  
- Improved entity, mob, and item processing  
- Reduced lag spikes during PvP and explosions  
- Optimized chunk loading and world updates  
- Combat-friendly configuration for Crystal PvP  
- Safe defaults for survival and SMP servers  
- Compatible with Paper / Fabric server environments  
- Designed to work perfectly with [FMCS-L](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l) / [FMCS-M](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-m) / [FMCS-H](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-h) clients

---

## 🧪 Expected Performance
- Higher and more stable TPS  
- Reduced tick spikes  
- Smoother combat and redstone behavior  
- Better performance under player load  
- Indirect FPS improvement for all players

---

## 🔗 Other Editions
- [FMCS‑L (Lite Edition)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
- [FMCS‑M (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-m)
- [FMCS‑H (High Edition)](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)

> [!NOTE]
> For weak GPUs → [FMCS‑L](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-l)  
> 
> For mid GPUs → [FMCS‑M](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fmcs-m) 
> 
> For nicer visuals → [FMCS‑H](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-h)
> 
> For servers → [FMCS‑S](https://modrinth.com/project/fmcs-s)
